Open Copilot

Settings

Configure the Ollama endpoint, installed models, and the default reply language for browser-side chat.

Routing LOCAL
Mode HYBRID
Connection

AI Providers

Tabbed Setup
Local

Ollama Control

Live Model Scan
Telemetry

Installed Models

Waiting for connection check.
Bridge

LM Studio Bridge

OpenAI Compatible

Use this section to keep LM Studio server information ready for future routing or OpenAI-compatible calls.

Cloud

Gemini

Google AI

Store your Gemini model and API key here so we can route future cloud requests without re-entering credentials.

Enterprise

Azure OpenAI

OpenAI on Azure

Save your Azure OpenAI resource endpoint, deployment name, API version, and key for future hosted routing.

Choose which AI provider should be used by default when future routing is enabled.

Task extraction uses visible chat content and prioritizes the last 3 days by default. You can increase the window up to 7 days.

Starter Routing

Starter Model Routing

Code Review Bias

Use the currently selected model as the default quick-reply model, and automatically switch code-analysis or GitHub review starters to a heavier model for that run only.

Save a GitHub personal access token so the extension can fetch GitHub file contents, including private repositories you can access.

Local Work Folder

Pick a local folder to auto-save chat sessions as JSON files. You can later load the latest saved conversation back into the panel.

No folder selected.

Configured Folder

Not available.

Google Drive Sync

Sync generated chat documents, Starter Skill Collection, and task reminders through Google Drive app data.

Redirect URL

Not available.

Not connected.

Behavior

Experience

Prompt Routing

Show a short description when you hover over a starter in the chat panel.

This prompt is sent before the user message and page context. Use it to define tone, constraints, and output rules.

One perspective per line using `Title|Instruction`. Leave empty to use the built-in defaults for each page type.

Starter Skills

Skills Library

Browse every built-in and custom skill in one full page. Built-in skills stay visible but locked from deletion.

AI Skills Collection

Each skill stays available to the quick chat panel and can be updated or removed here.

Total 0
Built-in 0
Custom 0 / 20
Custom Starters

Import a JSON array of starter objects with `label`, `prompt`, and optional `scopes` plus `mode`.

Up to 20 starter skills
Starter Skill Collection

Built-in skills are listed too, but only custom skills can be deleted.

No imported starters yet.
Agent Flow

Agent Flows

Manage every saved Agent Flow in a full-page workspace with enough room for summaries and step structure.

Agent Flow Collection

Flows are managed separately from single starter skills so the settings page stays easier to scan.

Stored 0
Linked Skills 0
Agent Flow Collection

Click a flow card to inspect every step before editing.

No Agent Flows yet.
